name: Tritax Big Box REIT plc
summary: Tritax Big Box REIT plc is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests in large logistics warehouses, known as "big boxes," in the United Kingdom. The company owns and manages a portfolio of modern, strategically located warehouses leased to a variety of tenants, and is based in London, United Kingdom. Tritax Big Box REIT aims to provide investors with stable income and capital growth from its portfolio of logistics assets.
